message:
fix: worker error handler returns 400 for bad JSON, uses structured error codes

- SyntaxError from malformed JSON body now returns 400 instead of 500
- QueryModeError.code drives HTTP status mapping (TABLE_NOT_FOUND→404,
  INVALID_FILTER→400, QUERY_TIMEOUT→504) instead of fragile string matching
- Error responses include the structured code when available
- String-matching fallback preserved for non-QueryModeError exceptions
